purpose: Illustrative scoped-nullifier fixture: same principal, two contexts, one repeated attempt. Nullifier values are placeholders — no nullifier construction has been selected (see ADR-003).

cross_context_check.assertion: null:CTX_A_2026_ATTEMPT and null:CTX_B_2026_ATTEMPT must not be correlatable by an issuer-verifier-colluding adversary under the profile's stated adversary model

known_gaps: who assigns and governs context_id is an open question (corpus section 12, item 1)
whether a context boundary must survive issuer-verifier collusion is the decision this fixture cannot itself resolve
